failedAssertions.reason: Returns HTTP 500 instead of HTTP 400 for unknown model. Error message is correct and lists available models, but status code violates OpenAI API spec.
Proxy /health endpoint shows 'unauthenticated' despite cursor-agent being authenticated. Auth file exists in ~/.cursor/cli-config.json but contains only user info, no access token.
cli-config.json does not contain an access token. Token appears to be stored in cursor-agent's own location, not in ~/.cursor/

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot test quota exceeded without triggering real API usage limits
Cannot make cursor-agent unauthenticated without breaking test environment

appliedUpdates.description: Created user testing guide with curl commands for HTTP API testing
Created services.yaml with cursor-proxy service definition
